Lumify
Table of Contents

Class SaveTextblockRequest

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Request body for updating a text block module (see SaveTextBlock(SaveTextblockRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

public sealed class SaveTextblockRequest
Inheritance
object
SaveTextblockRequest

Properties

CodeLanguage

New code language, if changing.

public string? CodeLanguage { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Content

New content, if changing.

public string? Content { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ID

The text block to update (required).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

IsCollapsed

New collapsed state, if changing.

public bool? IsCollapsed { get; set; }

Property Value

bool?

Name

New title/heading, if changing.

public string? Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

NotePos

New position within the note (reorders the block), if changing.

public int? NotePos { get; set; }

Property Value

int?

Type

New block type, if changing.

public int? Type { get; set; }

Property Value

int?
